Namkeen · Est. 1951

Nylon Sev

નાયલોન સેવ

"So thin, so fine — melts before you know it."

Nylon Sev is the finest, most delicate variety of sev — named for its hair-thin strands that are almost translucent when held to light. It dissolves the moment it touches your tongue, leaving behind a burst of savoury flavour. Perfect as a topping on bhel puri, sev puri, dahi puri or simply eaten by the handful.

Spice Level

🔴⚪⚪⚪ Very Mild

Shelf Life

15–20 days

Available In

200g · 500g · 1kg

Best With

Bhel puri

Order on WhatsApp ← Full Menu

How It's Made

કેવી રીતે બને છે

Every batch at SSKFG is made by hand, the same way it has been since 1951. No shortcuts. No machines doing what hands can do better.

1

Gram flour is mixed with water, turmeric and salt into a very smooth, flowing batter.

2

This batter is passed through the finest plate of a sev press directly into hot oil.

3

The resulting ultra-thin strands cook almost instantly and are scooped out immediately to preserve their delicate texture.

Ingredients

સામગ્રી

Gram Flour (Besan)Vegetable OilTurmericSaltAsafoetida (Hing)

Contains Allergens

⚠ Gluten (Besan)
